column1: # Korean STT domain corrections for church/sermon context

# These are applied as simple string replacements (not regex).

# Whisper sometimes drops or merges particles on biblical names
# Common homophone confusions in sermon context
# Place name misrecognitions (2026-04-05 Easter sermon transcript)
# Galilee: consistently misheard as similar-sounding nonsense words
# Church name: 예닮 (yedam = resemble Jesus), not 예담
# Cross misheard as similar-sounding nonsense words
# "Christ" truncation: Whisper drops 도 from 그리스도 → "그리스" (Greece)

# Bare "그리스" without 도: handled by vocab anchoring (can't safely substring-match)
